description_long: This object is a French press coffee maker, featuring a cylindrical glass carafe encased in a black metal frame with spiral cutouts at the base. The carafe is topped with a domed black lid, through which a long plunger rod extends vertically, ending in a round knob. A curved handle, also black, is attached to the side of the carafe for easy pouring. The transparent body allows visibility of the interior, while the base and lid provide structural support and a sleek, modern appearance. The plunger mechanism is visible, designed for pressing coffee grounds to the bottom. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for preparing and serving coffee in small urban kitchens or cafes.
description: A compact French press coffee maker with a clear glass carafe, black metal frame, domed lid, and a long plunger rod. It features a side handle and spiral cutout base for a modern look.
description_view_0: The French press is seen from the front, showing the handle on the right and the spout on the left, with the plunger rod centered above the domed lid.
description_view_1: Viewed from the side opposite the handle, the spiral cutout base and the full cylindrical shape of the carafe are prominent, with the plunger rod and knob directly above.
description_view_2: The handle is now on the left, and the spout is on the right, with the plunger rod and lid clearly visible from this angle.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this side view shows the carafe without the handle or spout visible, emphasizing the symmetry of the frame and lid.
